data.description: NEW BENCHMARKS FOR INDUSTRIES' FREE EU ETS ALLOWANCES WILL BE PUBLISHED SHORTLY AFTER EASTER, SENIOR EU OFFICIAL SAYS

data.title: SIDUS SPACE REPORTS FULL-YEAR 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS AND PROVIDES BUSINESS UPDATES
data.description: In a press release on April 1, 2026, Sidus Space, Inc. (NASDAQ: SIDU) shared its financial performance for Q4 and the full year of 2025. The company, known for its advancements in space and defense tech, revealed key figures from the period ending on December 31, 2025. Alongside this financial data, Sidus also offered insights into the current state of its operations.

data.title: Safe Harbor Financial Reports Preliminary Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Safe Harbor Financial (NASDAQ: SHFS) disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. Operating under the name SHF Holdings, Inc., Safe Harbor Financial is a financial technology firm catering to the banking, lending, and financial service requirements of the regulated cannabis and hemp sectors.

data.title: Aura Reports Updated Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources For The Year-Ended 2025, Highlighting year of Significant Growth in Mineral Reserve and Resource Portfolio
data.description: Aura recently released its updated mineral reserve and mineral resource data for 2025, showcasing substantial growth in reserves and resources. The company reported a significant increase in mineral reserves, now totaling X million tons, marking a Y% growth compared to the previous year. Additionally, Aura disclosed a notable boost in mineral resources, with a total of Z million tons recorded for the year. The latest figures represent a substantial expansion in both reserves and resources, indicating a successful year of development and enhancement for the company.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Acquires JDE Peet’s and  Announces Rafael Oliveira as CEO of Future Global Coffee Co.
data.description: Keurig Dr Pepper has recently acquired JDE Peet’s in a significant deal that positions them as a dominant force in the global coffee industry. As a result of this transaction, Rafael Oliveira has been appointed as the CEO of the newly formed Future Global Coffee Co. This acquisition cements the company's position with a strong global presence and notable impact on the market.

data.title: 10 alleged crypto market manipulators extradited to US for trial, including executives from Vortex, Contrarian, Gotbit, and Antier.
data.description: The recent extradition of executives from market makers Vortex, Contrarian, Gotbit, and Antier signifies the most recent development in a collective effort by multiple agencies aimed at combating alleged instances of providing "market-manipulation-as-a-service." This crackdown highlights the severity of the issue at hand and underlines the ongoing efforts to address such practices.

data.title: Cal-Maine Foods Welcomes Dudley D. Wooley to Board of Directors
data.description: Cal-Maine has appointed Dudley Wooley to its Board of Directors to enhance risk management, strategy development, and capital allocation. This move is aimed at bolstering the company's long-term growth and ensuring earnings stability. Dudley Wooley's expertise will be valuable in guiding the company towards its goals.

data.title: Lotus Returns to Milan Design Week 2026 with “IN PROGRESS,” an Immersive Exploration of Design in Motion
data.description: Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent intelligent and luxury mobility provider listed on Nasdaq as LOT, revealed its plans to participate in Milan Design Week 2026 with an exhibition named IN PROGRESS. The event is a joint effort with Haus of Automotive and powered by Konzepthaus, a cultural hub fostering brand collaboration and creativity. Scheduled from April 22 to April 26, the showcase aims to showcase Lotus as more than just a final product but as a dynamic brand embodying curiosity, experimentation, and constant evolution.
Cal-Maine Foods Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results

data.title: SOLV Energy Highlights Industry-Leading O&M Scale and Largest Single-Site Agreement Ahead of AMNA 2026
data.description: SOLV Energy has announced that its operations and maintenance portfolio has surpassed 20 gigawatts. The company also emphasized its involvement in managing one of the biggest solar-plus-storage facilities in the United States.

data.title: Global Net Lease, Inc. Announces Common Stock Dividend for the Second Quarter 2026
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Global Net Lease, Inc. (GNL) declared a dividend of $0.190 per share for their common stock, which will be paid out on April 17, 2026. This dividend is for common stockholders recorded on April 13, 2026. This dividend applies to those holding GNL shares on the NYSE under the tickers GNL, GNL PRA, GNL PRB, GNL PRD, and GNL PRE.
